title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・渾身のロングラン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan runs with all her might in the spring
Tenno Sho, and with her victory, she puts a stop
to Mejiro McQueen's ambition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though frustrated by defeat, McQueen
congratulates Ryan on her win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Ryan is the one ahead, she declares
herself ready to take on any challenge from
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is the spring race that decides the
medium-distance champion—the Takarazuka
Kinen. If she does well, then her ranking in the fan
poll is sure to rise!
